div.head: The Assistant Secretary of State (Dearing) to President King
div.p: My Dear Mr. President: I have received your letter of October 27, 1921,Not printed. in which you inform me that the Loan Plan, as redrafted, has your approval and that you are now prepared for the formal signing thereof.

It is therefore respectfully requested that the members of the Liberian Plenary Commission come to the Department of State tomorrow, Friday, October 28, 1921, at four-thirty p.m. in order that they, in conjunction with the Secretary of State, may sign the Loan Plan and the supplementary Depositary Agreement.
